steps.title: Identify the researchers' central conclusion
steps.content: The passage's key claim is in this sentence: “The researchers have concluded that these settlements were culturally linked to Izapa because each of the settlements is the same age and configured in the same manner as Izapa.” The word because identifies the basis for their conclusion: the settlements match Izapa's architectural design.

steps.title: Find the choice that captures this reasoning
steps.content:
D directly captures the passage's logic: researchers inferred the settlements were culturally connected to Izapa based on their matching structural design.
The other three either reverse the causal direction, introduce unsupported comparisons about ceremony importance, or shift focus to the discovery itself rather than the reasoning.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
